visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with round glasses and a blue textured flat cap stands in a brightly lit indoor space with a staircase in the background. He speaks directly to the camera with an expressive face and enthusiastic gestures. (2) He holds up a black textured box with "F1" and "SINGAPORE AIRLINES" embossed on it. The box has a window showing a green pass inside. (3) He slides the inner tray of the box out, revealing a green and white F1 pass with a green lanyard. He carefully removes the lanyard to show it to the camera. (4) He brings the pass closer to the lens, showing the "OKX" logo and event details like "FRIDAY 03 OCT". He points at different sections of the pass. (5) He holds up the green lanyard, showing the orange and black patterns and the small metal F1 logo attachment. (6) He puts the lanyard around his neck and continues to explain the features of the pass, including the access areas for the event. (7) He turns the pass over to show a QR code and instructions on the back for the viewer. (8) He gives a friendly smile and waves goodbye as the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 哇 我拿到了. (2) [Subtitle]: F1 這一次. (3) [Subtitle]: 今年的門票. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且我是. (5) [Subtitle]: 今天的場次. (6) [Subtitle]: 我們來開箱一下這個門票. (7) [Subtitle]: 超級有質感的喔. (8) [Subtitle]: 我們先看下. (9) [Subtitle]: 盒子啊. (10) [Subtitle]: 你有沒有看到這邊有一個F1的字樣. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後呢 這邊下面. (12) [Subtitle]: 贊助商全部. (13) [Subtitle]: 你看這個盒子全部都是局部上光. (14) [Subtitle]: 我們把它拉開. (15) [Subtitle]: 哇塞 在這裡. (16) [Subtitle]: 你看這邊 贊助商 這是OKX. (17) [Subtitle]: 好 然後呢. (18) [Subtitle]: 我這個票呢 是他們在. (19) [Subtitle]: 彎道3那邊的. (20) [Subtitle]: 那個看台區. (21) [Subtitle]: 好 應該算是. (22) [Subtitle]: 有一個好像是VIP的票. (23) [Subtitle]: 那我這是10月3號. (24) [Subtitle]: 因為今天 是練習賽. (25) [Subtitle]: 但是因為今天晚上有GD. (26) [Subtitle]: 然後明天 是排位賽. (27) [Subtitle]: 後天才正規賽. (28) [Subtitle]: 所以我選擇了. (29) [Subtitle]: 今天去看. (30) [Subtitle]: 然後你可以看一看. (31) [Subtitle]: 它上面這邊. (32) [Subtitle]: 哇. (33) [Subtitle]: 這個是金屬的耶. (34) [Subtitle]: 我把它拿出來了啊. (35) [Subtitle]: 這邊還是有一個F1. (36) [Subtitle]: 有一個F1的字樣. (37) [Subtitle]: 對 我現在是用. (38) [Subtitle]: 用17PRO的前鏡頭在拍的. (39) [Subtitle]: 因為前鏡頭現在是全系列都是一樣. (40) [Subtitle]: 把它掛起來. (41) [Subtitle]: 這邊. (42) [Subtitle]: 它這邊都有幫你標示. (43) [Subtitle]: 因為我這個區域. (44) [Subtitle]: 它是全區域都可以去. (45) [Subtitle]: 包含可以去看GD. (46) [Subtitle]: 好 你可以看到. (47) [Subtitle]: 嗯 然後後面. (48) [Subtitle]: 它這邊有一個 你可以掃QR code. (49) [Subtitle]: 可以下載它的APP. (50) [Subtitle]: 哇 好帥喔. (51) [Subtitle]: 剛好搭配我眼鏡耶. (52) [Subtitle]: 好 先這樣. (53) [Subtitle]: 我要出發了. (54) [Subtitle]: 掰掰.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey t-shirt, round olive-green glasses, and a blue denim-style flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor home setting with white walls, a wooden and metal staircase, and a glimpse of a second-floor landing.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The speaker introduces the F1 ticket package with high vocal arousal and energetic intonation. There is no BGM, keeping the focus entirely on his voice. (2) A mechanical sliding sound (SFX: Mechanical Slide) is heard as he opens the ticket box. (3) Soft rustling sounds (SFX: Plastic/Bag Rustle) occur as he handles the lanyard and pass. (4) The speaker's tone remains friendly and excited as he details the sponsors and seating areas. (5) Minor clothing rustling sounds (SFX: Fabric Rustle) are audible as he puts the lanyard around his neck. (6) He concludes the video with a warm farewell and a slight rise in vocal pitch.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Unboxing -> Product Detail -> CTA/Farewell
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share the excitement of receiving VIP tickets for the F1 Singapore Grand Prix and to showcase the premium packaging and benefits of the pass, including the sponsor OKX.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of F1 tickets and repeated mention of the sponsor OKX.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy unboxing vlog focusing on the premium F1 ticket experience with clear branding for OKX.
